mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey_ai_summaries ( summary_id, company_id, template_id, start_date, end_date, language, input_hash, health_level, summary_json, generated_at, generated_by ) VALUES ( #{summaryId}, #{companyId}, #{templateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{language}, #{inputHash}, #{healthLevel}, #{summaryJson}, #{generatedAt}, #{generatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE survey_ai_summaries SET health_level = #{healthLevel}, summary_json = #{summaryJson}, generated_at = #{generatedAt}, generated_by = #{generatedBy} WHERE summary_id = #{summaryId}
